## Checklist

- [ ] `npm run format:check` passes
- [ ] `npm run lint` passes

- [ ] PR title follows Conventional Commits (`feat:`, `fix:`, `chore:`, `refactor:`, `docs:`, `i18n:`)
- [ ] New/updated strings added to both `locales/ko.json` and `locales/en.json` (if applicable)
